title: Use $$r$$
text: If the common ratio $$r$$ has absolute value less than $$1$$, the geometric series converges.

title: Find $$r$$
text: Find the common ratio between terms of the geometric series.

title: Check |r|
text: Since $$r$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{2}{3}$$, we have |r| $$=$$ $$\frac{2}{3}$$ < $$1$$. This means the infinite geometric series converges.

title: Conclusion
text: Because the series is geometric with |r| < $$1$$, the infinite sum is defined.
